faqs.question: What spider species are common in East Tremont?
faqs.answer: East Tremont properties typically encounter common house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows in undisturbed areas. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method for your situation.
